extract: Victreebel (Japanese: ウツボット Utsubot) is a dual-type Grass/Poison Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves from Weepinbell when exposed to a Leaf Stone. It is the final form of Bellsprout. Victreebel can Mega Evolve into Mega Victreebel using the Victreebelite. Mega Victreebel was introduced in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.
